metadata.description: Leaniverse agent skills — helping solopreneurs build lean, platform-independent digital product businesses

plugins.name: leaniverse-mentor
plugins.description: Leaniverse business mentor — strategic guidance for solopreneurs building lean, platform-independent digital product businesses

plugins.name: leaniverse-deploy
plugins.description: Leaniverse deploy assistant — step-by-step Hetzner VPS deployment for Docker, Next.js, and Python apps

plugins.name: crystal-prompt
plugins.description: Crystal Prompt — automatically evaluates prompt clarity and asks targeted questions before Claude executes

plugins.name: leaniverse-igf
plugins.description: Leaniverse IGF — designs Instant Gratification Funnels that turn cold visitors into warm email subscribers by delivering expert value before asking for anything in return

plugins.name: leaniverse-prd
plugins.description: Leaniverse PRD — guides solopreneurs through producing a minimal, structured product requirements document ready to hand to Claude Code

plugins.name: leaniverse-content
plugins.description: Leaniverse Content — extracts brand voice into BRAND-VOICE.md and writes or rewrites content that strictly matches the brand's voice, tone, style, and themes

plugins.name: leaniverse-upsell
plugins.description: Leaniverse Upsell — generates creative post-purchase upsell ideas by pairing products with strategic rationale, then optionally builds a branded sales page guideline

plugins.name: leaniverse-newsletter
plugins.description: Leaniverse Newsletter — builds a complete email follow-up sequence in the user's brand voice, calibrated to their goal, salesy level, and number of issues
